context: Tests format compliance across the full brand vault for a new brand (Graze). Focuses on the specific format requirements: palette.json six-role structure with hex+use, principles.md We/We-don't/Why format with 3-7 entries, source.json ISO date and sources array, and source-quotes.md word-count limit with URL attribution. This scenario provides coverage of format instructions for a brand not used in earlier scenarios.

checklist.name: palette.json — six roles present
checklist.description: palette.json contains all six required top-level keys: primary, secondary, page_bg, card_bg, text, muted

checklist.name: palette.json — hex + use per entry
checklist.description: Each of the six palette entries has both a 'hex' sub-field (a real color value, not #XXXXXX placeholder) and a 'use' sub-field describing the color's role

checklist.name: principles.md — 3–7 entries
checklist.description: principles.md contains between 3 and 7 brand principles (not fewer, not more)

checklist.name: principles.md — We/We-don't/Why format
checklist.description: At least 3 of the principles in principles.md follow the 'We do X. We don't do Y. Why: Z.' sentence structure (or a close variant using 'We' and 'Why:')

checklist.name: source.json — fetched_at ISO format
checklist.description: source.json 'fetched_at' field contains a date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or a full ISO datetime string) — NOT a natural-language date

checklist.name: source.json — sources is an array
checklist.description: source.json 'sources' field is a JSON array containing at least one URL string

checklist.name: source.json — all five fields
checklist.description: source.json contains all five required fields: brand, slug, fetched_at, sources, notes

checklist.name: source-quotes.md — at least 5 quotes
checklist.description: examples/source-quotes.md contains at least 5 quoted phrases from the Graze website

checklist.name: source-quotes.md — each quote ≤15 words
checklist.description: Every individual quote in source-quotes.md is 15 words or fewer — no quote exceeds this limit

checklist.name: source-quotes.md — URL per quote
checklist.description: Each quote in source-quotes.md includes the source URL it was pulled from (a URL near each individual quote, not just at the top of the file)
